codeReview.summary: The implementation correctly unifies smart routing behind a single Rust module (`rust_core/src/routing.rs`), enforcing the expected priority tree (--index > --gpu-device-ids > --force-cpu > AST > warm index > auto GPU > auto CPU > rg fallback). Backend names and reasons are updated, docs reflect the changes, tests are comprehensive, and CLI bootstrapping accurately handles the new commands.

sharedStateObservations.observation: Worker suggested adding a note to the `mission-worker-base` skill about resuming from a prior Droid summary and skipping re-reading the full startup context.
sharedStateObservations.evidence: Transcript skeleton shows deviation: 'Resumed from the previous worker summary... only then re-invoked mission-worker-base before handoff.'

summary: Review completed successfully. The code perfectly matches the requirements for smart routing unification, ensuring accurate, predictable backend selection across all branches.
